quests.title: Rats in the Cellar
quests.reward: 25 gp and a week of free meals
quests.summary: A tavern keeper needs help clearing strange rats from the cellar.
quests.description: Borin Ashmug claims the rats in his cellar have grown bold enough to chew through locked crates and frighten away paying customers. He wants the problem handled quietly before rumors damage the tavern's reputation.
quests.complication: The rats are protecting a cracked stone idol buried behind the ale barrels. Removing it may stop the infestation, but it could also awaken whatever the idol was sealing.

quests.title: The Missing Courier
quests.reward: 75 gp and access to the guardhouse records
quests.summary: A courier vanished while carrying an important sealed message.
quests.description: The courier was last seen near the old milestone road, where wagon tracks split away from the main path and disappear into the deeper woods. Captain Vane wants the courier found and the sealed message returned unopened.
quests.complication: The courier is alive, but has joined a band of outlaws after learning what the message contained. The party may have to choose between returning the letter or exposing the captain's secret.

quests.title: The Broken Shrine
quests.reward: Healing supplies and temple favor
quests.summary: Villagers hear whispers coming from an abandoned shrine.
quests.description: Sister Maela asks the party to investigate an abandoned roadside shrine where candles appear each morning despite no one admitting to lighting them. The villagers fear a haunting, but the whispers sound more mournful than malicious.
quests.complication: The voice is not evil. It belongs to a forgotten guardian spirit asking for release. Helping it may anger the local temple, which has built its authority on a false version of Saint Orwyn's story.

quests.title: The Saint Beneath the Stone
quests.location: Catacombs beneath the Shrine of Saint Orwyn
quests.reward: Temple relic, divine favor, and forgotten history
quests.summary: A hidden chamber beneath the broken shrine may reveal the truth about Saint Orwyn.
quests.description: After the guardian spirit is freed, old stonework shifts beneath the shrine and reveals a sealed stairway. The catacombs below contain records, relics, and warnings that contradict the official temple story.
quests.complication: Saint Orwyn may not have been a saint at all. The party must decide whether to expose the truth, protect the faithful, or use the secret as leverage.

quests.title: Bandits at Blackbridge
quests.reward: 100 gp and discounted travel supplies
quests.summary: Travelers are being robbed near the bridge outside town.
quests.description: Caravans have been attacked at Blackbridge Crossing three times in the last tenday. The Merchant Hall wants the raids stopped before the trade road becomes unusable.
quests.complication: The bandit leader is a former town guard who claims the merchants ruined his family. Some of the stolen goods have been redistributed to poor families along the river.

quests.title: The Wyrm Below
quests.reward: Ancient treasure and a rare wyrm-scale relic
quests.summary: Something ancient has awakened beneath the ruined watchtower.
quests.description: Earthquakes have opened a stairwell beneath the ruined watchtower. Heat and the smell of sulfur rise from below, and hunters report seeing scorched animals near the hill.
quests.complication: The wyrm is wounded and desperate, not simply hungry. If the party discovers who injured it, they may uncover a larger threat moving beneath the region.

quests.title: A Noble's Secret
quests.reward: Political leverage and 150 gp
quests.summary: A noble family is hiding something dangerous behind closed doors.
quests.description: An anonymous letter claims servants have disappeared from House Veyr Manor. The family insists nothing is wrong, but the staff are terrified and the city watch refuses to investigate without proof.
quests.complication: The noble heir is cursed, and the family is covering it up to avoid losing power. The missing servants may still be alive, hidden in a sealed wing of the manor.

quests.title: The Bell That Rings Below
quests.reward: Unknown
quests.summary: Each midnight, a buried bell tolls beneath the town.
quests.description: No one can find the bell, but every toll is followed by a new name appearing in the town records. Those named begin dreaming of their own deaths within three nights.
quests.complication: The bell is part of an ancient warning system, not the true threat. Destroying it may silence the only thing trying to protect the town.

quests.title: The Stolen Signet
quests.reward: 40 gp and a custom silver charm
quests.summary: A valuable signet ring vanished during the morning market rush.
quests.description: Jessa Coinbright swears the ring was stolen from a locked display case while the market was crowded. She needs it recovered before the noble who ordered it arrives at sundown.
quests.complication: The thief is a child working for someone else. If pressured, the child reveals that the ring was not stolen for money, but to forge a noble decree.

quests.title: The Map in the Well
quests.reward: 60 gp and a safe place to rest
quests.summary: A village well has dried up, revealing a carved map in the stone below.
quests.description: The well in Mosswick Village ran dry overnight. At the bottom, the villagers discovered a carved map pointing toward a hill that does not appear on any local chart.
quests.complication: The map changes when moonlight touches it. It may be less of a map and more of an invitation.

quests.title: The Hollow Harvest
quests.reward: Food stores, 80 gp, and farmer goodwill
quests.summary: A farming village is preparing a harvest festival, but the crops are empty inside.
quests.description: The grain looks healthy from the outside, but each stalk is hollow and gray within. The farmers are desperate to avoid panic before the harvest festival begins.
quests.complication: A local druid caused the blight intentionally to expose a buried corpse beneath the fields. The corpse belongs to someone the village claims left years ago.

quests.title: Lanterns Over Fogwatch
quests.reward: 90 gp and coastal passage
quests.summary: The lighthouse keeper vanished, but the lantern still burns every night.
quests.description: Mira Voss asks the party to find her missing brother, the keeper of Fogwatch Point. The lighthouse has remained lit since his disappearance, even though no one has entered the tower.
quests.complication: The keeper is trapped below the tide caves after bargaining with a sea spirit. The light is being kept alive by something waiting offshore.

quests.title: The Drowned Bell
quests.reward: Pearls worth 200 gp and a sea-spirit blessing
quests.summary: A bell lost beneath the tide caves may control the waters around Fogwatch Point.
quests.description: At low tide, a path opens beneath the cliffs near Fogwatch Point. Somewhere below, an ancient bell rings softly under the water.
quests.complication: Ringing the bell may save the lighthouse keeper, but it also calls every drowned thing within miles back toward shore.

quests.title: The Masked Ball
quests.reward: A noble alliance or a dangerous enemy
quests.summary: A noble ball may reveal who is funding unrest in the city.
quests.description: Invitations to House Veyr's masked ball are nearly impossible to obtain, but the event may be the only chance to identify the noble patron behind several recent crimes.
quests.complication: Several guests are wearing identical masks because one of them is not who they claim to be. The wrong accusation could turn the entire court against the party.

quests.title: The Ember Crown
quests.reward: The Ember Crown and royal recognition
quests.summary: A lost crown beneath the mountains may be tied to the region's unrest.
quests.description: Clues from the ruined watchtower and noble court point toward the Ashen Vault, where an old symbol of royal power was buried after a failed rebellion.
quests.complication: The crown is not just treasure. It is a binding relic, and wearing it may force the bearer into an ancient oath that still has power.

quests.title: The Smuggler's Ledger
quests.reward: 45 gp and access to dock manifests
quests.summary: A hidden ledger at the docks may expose a quiet smuggling ring.
quests.description: Harbor Clerk Tessa Marrow found mismatched cargo records and fears someone in the dock office is helping smugglers move goods through Dunmere. She needs outsiders who can investigate without tipping off the harbor watch.
quests.complication: The ledger does not only name smugglers. It also includes payments from a noble household and a jeweler's account that should not exist.

quests.title: Whispers in the Archive
quests.reward: Forbidden records and a forgotten map
quests.summary: Old town records have begun rewriting themselves after midnight.
quests.description: The Town Archivist has locked the archive doors after discovering that names, dates, and causes of death are changing in the oldest ledgers. He believes the changes are connected to a buried warning beneath the town.
quests.complication: The records are not being falsified. They are correcting themselves as old magic wakes up, and some of the corrections implicate respected families.

quests.title: The Orchard of Glass
quests.reward: 35 gp and a pouch of glass apples
quests.summary: An orchard's fruit has turned clear and brittle overnight.
quests.description: Sella Brin asks the party to investigate why every apple in Glassmere Orchard has become transparent, sharp, and humming faintly in the wind. The villagers worry the harvest is cursed.
quests.complication: The orchard roots have grown into an old buried road marker, and the marker is reacting to travelers who never reached their destination.

quests.title: The Clockwork Hound
quests.reward: 80 gp and a minor clockwork trinket
quests.summary: A missing mechanical hound keeps returning with blood on its brass jaws.
quests.description: Marn Kessit built a clockwork hound to guard his workshop, but it vanished three nights ago. Each dawn it returns briefly, damaged and stained, before running back into the alleys.
quests.complication: The hound is not attacking people. It is trying to stop something from leaving an abandoned foundry beneath the district.

quests.title: The Foundry Without Smoke
quests.reward: Rare machine parts and 160 gp
quests.summary: An abandoned foundry is running at night without fire, workers, or smoke.
quests.description: The clockwork hound's trail leads to an old foundry that should have gone cold decades ago. Inside, machines move on their own and hammer metal stamped with a forgotten royal mark.
quests.complication: The foundry is assembling pieces of an oath-bound war machine, and one component bears the same symbol as the Ember Crown.
